message:
✨ Include issue description and link in Copilot comment

- Add issue URL link for full context
- Include issue body/description
- Add instruction to read issue link

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -73,17 +73,26 @@ jobs:
       - name: Trigger Copilot to fix issue
         env:
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          ISSUE_BODY: ${{ steps.issue_details.outputs.body }}
         run: |
-          gh issue comment ${{ steps.issue.outputs.number }} --repo ${{ github.repository }} --body "@copilot Please analyze this issue and create a pull request with a fix.
+          ISSUE_URL="https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/issues/${{ steps.issue.outputs.number }}"
+
+          gh issue comment ${{ steps.issue.outputs.number }} --repo ${{ github.repository }} --body "@copilot Please fix this issue and create a pull request.
+
+          **Issue Link:** $ISSUE_URL
 
           **Issue:** ${{ steps.issue_details.outputs.title }}
 
+          **Description:**
+          $ISSUE_BODY
+
           **Instructions:**
-          1. Analyze the codebase to understand the issue
-          2. Create a fix branch \`ai-fix/issue-${{ steps.issue.outputs.number }}\`
-          3. Implement minimal, focused changes
-          4. Open a pull request with the fix
-          5. Follow existing code patterns
+          1. Read the issue link above for full context
+          2. Analyze the codebase to understand the problem
+          3. Create a fix branch \`ai-fix/issue-${{ steps.issue.outputs.number }}\`
+          4. Implement minimal, focused changes
+          5. Open a pull request with the fix
+          6. Follow existing code patterns
 
           **Project structure:**
           - \`/web\`: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite frontend
